title: Dead top-level useTheme import in tailwind-utils.ts
description: tailwind-utils.ts imports useTheme from theme-provider at module level but pure functions don't use it. Causes unnecessary React context dependency at module evaluation.
resolution: Removed useTheme import and dead hook wrappers (useEmbossShadow, useEmbossTheme, useIsDark) from tailwind-utils.ts
